title: Tokenised Knowledge UX Strategy — Hub71, Abu Dhabi
summary: UX and product strategy for tokenised knowledge concepts in the Abu Dhabi innovation ecosystem.
body:
Tokenised Knowledge UX Strategy for Hub71 focuses on product and experience strategy for knowledge systems in the Abu Dhabi innovation ecosystem.

Included projects
- Tokenised Knowledge UX Strategy

Strategic and technical themes
- Product strategy for making knowledge structures more reusable and actionable.
- UX thinking around tokenised knowledge concepts without overclaiming blockchain delivery.
- Context and information design in an innovation-ecosystem setting.
- Enterprise-architecture thinking applied to knowledge flow, trust, and reuse.

Proof connection
- This record is intentionally scoped as strategy and UX work.
- It should not introduce unsupported financial, tokenisation, or blockchain implementation claims.

Retrieval guidance
- Use this record for questions specifically about Hub71, Abu Dhabi innovation work, or tokenised knowledge strategy.
- Keep the answer focused on product, UX, and knowledge experience strategy.

claims: Joz worked on tokenised knowledge UX and product strategy in the Hub71 innovation ecosystem.
The work focused on knowledge experience and product framing rather than unsupported infrastructure claims.
proof_points: This programme record is positioned as product and UX strategy for knowledge systems.
It connects to Joz's broader context-engineering and enterprise-architecture capabilities.
metadata.source_notes: Grouped programme record. No unsupported blockchain or financial claims added.
